column5: note: ideally get ahead early, more room for lag at end
updated note: we got off on the wrong foot and didn't start until 2 weeks into the official sprint start

We did complete what feels like a lot, but it deviated from the specific story items and we did a lot for non-functional requirements which were not accounted for in the initial story point estimation
note: get the AI model sorted between sprints so we can knock off things in chunks
